data.title: NHC Completes Acquisition of Thirty-Five NHI Facilities
data.description: National Healthcare Corporation (NYSE American: NHC), a prominent senior care provider, recently finalized the acquisition of the real estate holdings of thirty-two skilled nursing facilities and three independent living facilities from National Health Investors, Inc. (NHI) and its affiliates. The purchase price for this transaction amounted to $560 million. Prior to this acquisition, NHC was already operating these facilities under a leasing agreement with NHI.

data.title: Pure Hockey Strengthens Commitment to Utah's Growing Hockey Community With New Bountiful Store
data.description: Pure Hockey, the leading hockey gear retailer in the US, revealed plans to open a new store in Bountiful, Utah, marking its second location in the state alongside the Murray store. The company boasts over 110 stores nationwide and continues to expand its presence in the sports equipment market.

data.title: Compass Diversified Declares Second Quarter 2026 Distributions on Series A, B and C Preferred Shares
data.description: Today, Compass Diversified (NYSE: CODI) based in Westport, Connecticut, shared that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash distribution for its three preferred share series. This announcement was made on July 1, 2026. CODI is known for owning prominent middle market businesses.
New Zealand seasonally adjusted new dwelling consents drop 4% in May versus previous month

data.title: USDC's programmable money revolutionizes enterprise payments - boosting efficiency, with faster settlements and lower costs.
data.description: Discover the ways in which USDC is revolutionizing enterprise payments by providing programmable money that allows for automated processes, quicker settlements, and reduced expenses. This innovation is leading to significant enhancements in financial operations, making transactions more efficient and cost-effective for businesses.

data.title: Banxico survey lowers inflation expectations; Polymarket indicates 78% chance of no Fed cuts in 2026, impacting global rates.
data.description: According to recent data from Mexico’s central bank, a survey of private economists reveals expectations for a decrease in inflation. This adjustment supports a more subdued forecast for prices, which could impact global interest rate predictions.

data.title: Bitcoin hovers near $58.6K, Polymarket bets 99.95% on $52K by July 3. June saw $4.5B outflows from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs, its lowest since debut.
data.description: Bitcoin was trading at approximately $58,600 in early July following a month of June which witnessed around $4.5 billion in net outflows from U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs, marking their most significant monthly decline since their inception.

data.title: Sha Tin Race feed glitched with Polymarket Taiwan bet drop to 3.65%. July 1, 2026 Sha Tin Race 1 lacked Taiwan info.
data.description: On July 1, 2026, a race event in Sha Tin concluded with Race 1 known as the "RACING GOES ON HANDICAP." The race details were provided in a feed entry with no additional information or specific mention of Taiwan. For more information on the race results, interested individuals can refer to the source.

data.title: 2026 WC knockout stage is set with Polymarket cutting 1st-time champ odds to 21.5%. Final on July 19, with Canada vs Morocco, Brazil vs Norway.
data.description: The group stage of the 2026 World Cup has concluded, and the tournament has now entered the knockout stage. The final is scheduled for July 19th and the Round of 16 matchups have been confirmed. Canada will face Morocco, while Brazil will go up against Norway. This sets the stage for an exciting continuation of the tournament as the teams battle for a spot in the quarterfinals.

data.title: Columbia Financial, Inc. Announces Receipt of Stockholder and Depositor Approvals of Pending Second Step Conversion and Updated Results of Subscription Offering
data.description: On July 01, 2026, Columbia Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLBK), the mid-tier holding company for Columbia Bank, based in Fair Lawn, N.J., announced key decisions made during recent meetings. At the Annual Meeting of Stockholders on June 25, 2026, stockholders agreed to the Plan of Conversion and Reorganization. This plan entails Columbia Bank MHC transitioning from a mutual holding company to a fully public stock holding company. Furthermore, the acquisition of Northfield Bancorp, Inc. was also approved during this meeting. The acquisition of Northfield will take place simultaneously with the completion of the Conversion. Moreover, at a Special Meeting of Members of Columbia Bank MHC on June 29, 2026, depositors of the Bank also gave their approval for the Conversion to proceed.

data.title: Ruveon Launches as Dedicated U.S. Glyphosate Leader
data.description: Today, in St. Louis, Ruveon emerged as a prominent glyphosate leader after Bayer Group consolidated their U.S. glyphosate resources into a separate entity. This move positions Ruveon as the primary domestic provider of glyphosate-based solutions crucial to U.S. agriculture and food security. By consolidating the U.S. glyphosate business, Ruveon aims to enhance value for growers. Their dedication to supporting growers is evident in their strategic shift towards becoming the leading producer of essential glyphosate products in the country.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Michael Bonner Elevated to UNLV Foundation Board Chair
data.description: In Las Vegas on July 1, 2026, Michael J. Bonner from the global law firm Greenberg Traurig LLP, serving as co-managing shareholder of the firm's Las Vegas office, has been appointed as the University of Nevada, Las Vegas (UNLV) Foundation Board of Trustees chairman for a two-year term. This appointment is a significant milestone in Bonner's career trajectory and marks a key partnership between the legal and academic sectors.

data.title: Selling Scottsdale TV Series Spotlights Scottsdale Real Estate and Lifestyle on REAL Shows Network
data.description: Becky Kennard is spearheading a new series that showcases the individuals, communities, and enterprises shaping Scottsdale and the broader Valley area. The program, which is locally produced, offers a spotlight on the essence of the region. The initiative is set in Scottsdale, Arizona, with the launch date being July 1, 2026. REAL Shows Network (RSN), a television network with a focus on boosting the real estate sector, is behind this venture. The series aims to explore the distinctive aspects of the locale and its people, with a special emphasis on businesses.

data.title: Bitcoin exceeded $60K as Federal Reserve discusses inflation: Will it hit $65K or is it a bull trap amid rate hike fears and BTC spot ETF outflows?
data.description: Despite concerns about a potential rate hike by the Federal Reserve and ongoing outflows from Bitcoin spot ETFs, the cryptocurrency surged past the $60,000 mark. With questions arising about whether this rally could be a bull trap, the digital asset continues to draw attention from investors.
